title: Pan-Seared Fish Stew
description: A hearty Norwegian-inspired stew filled with tender fish and savory flavors. This dish is perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the carrots and potatoes; cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the fish stock and savory spice blend; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 10-12 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
Add the cod fish fillets and cook for an additional 4-6 minutes or until cooked through.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
